name: Aluminum
description: A lightweight, silvery-white metal commonly used in various industries.

name: Boron
description: A chemical element with diverse applications, including as borax and boric acid.

name: Carbon
description: The fundamental building block of organic compounds and the basis of life on Earth.

name: Dysprosium
description: A rare-earth element with various uses in high-strength alloys.

name: Einsteinium
description: A synthetic element named after Albert Einstein.

name: Fluorine
description: A highly reactive halogen gas used in various applications.

name: Gold
description: A precious metal known for its beauty and value.

name: Hydrogen
description: The lightest and most abundant element in the universe.

name: Iodine
description: A halogen element used in various applications, including medicine.

name: Jodium
description: A synthetic element named with the Dutch name for iodine.

name: Krypton
description: A noble gas used in lighting and lasers.

name: Lithium
description: A lightweight alkali metal used in batteries and other applications.

name: Manganese
description: A transition metal used in steel production.

name: Neon
description: A noble gas known for its use in neon signs.

name: Oxygen
description: A life-sustaining element essential for respiration.

name: Phosphorus
description: A non-metallic element important for life and industry.

name: Quicksilver
description: A historical name for mercury, a heavy metal.

name: Radium
description: A radioactive element discovered by Marie Curie.

name: Sulfur
description: A non-metallic element with various industrial uses.

name: Titanium
description: A strong, lightweight metal used in aerospace and medical implants.

name: Uranium
description: A radioactive element used in nuclear reactors.

name: Vanadium
description: A transition metal with various industrial applications.

name: Wolfram
description: A metal also known as tungsten, used in high-temperature applications.

name: Xenon
description: A noble gas used in lighting and medical imaging.

name: Yttrium
description: A transition metal used in various applications.

name: Zinc
description: A metallic element commonly used in alloys and as a dietary supplement.
